channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Opinion: America remains an ongoing project
item.description: Poets like Walt Whitman and Langston Hughes have written movingly about America.

item.title: Swing voters express cautious optimism about America at 250
item.description: As the nation turns 250, voters from the Swing Shift project share views ranging from uncertain to concerned about the country's state.

item.title: Washington cancels July 4 parade but fireworks display continues
item.description: Organizers canceled the Independence Day Parade late Friday due to an extreme heat warning, with temperatures expected to reach 115 degrees.

item.title: Schisto & Ladders: A Board Game That Teaches About Parasitic Worms
item.description: Schistosomiasis, caused by parasitic worms, leads to severe symptoms, especially in children. A board game aims to educate...
